Localization.Description: Password bruteforcing to confirm the second authentication factor

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} tried to bruteforce the password to confirm the second authentication factor
User {subject.account.name} bruteforced the password to confirm the second authentication factor
User {subject.account.name} bruteforced the password to confirm the second authentication factor from host {external_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} tried to bruteforce the password to confirm the second authentication factor from host {external_src.host}
